title: senecio laciniatus
intro: Senecio laciniatus, also known as perennial groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its deeply lobed leaves and clusters of small, yellow or reddish-brown flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Senecio laciniatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and address various health concerns.
